mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT th.history_id FROM task_history th LEFT JOIN task t ON th.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN project p ON t.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN users u ON th.changed_by = u.user_code LEFT JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT JOIN task_history_detail d_type ON th.history_id = d_type.history_id AND d_type.field_name = 'type_name'
AND t.project_id = #{projectId}
AND u.user_code = #{userCode}
AND th.action_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD')
AND th.action_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY
AND NVL(d_type.new_value, tt.type_name) IN
#{type}
UNION ALL
SELECT w.wiki_page_id AS history_id FROM wiki_pages w JOIN users u2 ON w.user_code = u2.user_code
AND w.project_id = #{projectId} AND u2.user_code = #{userCode} AND w.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AND w.created_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY
UNION ALL
SELECT h.wiki_history_id AS history_id FROM wiki_histories h JOIN wiki_pages wp ON h.wiki_page_id = wp.wiki_page_id JOIN users u3 ON h.user_code = u3.user_code
AND wp.project_id = #{projectId} AND u3.user_code = #{userCode} AND h.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AND h.created_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY
)

SELECT NVL(SUM(w.spent_hour), 0) FROM work_time w LEFT JOIN task t ON w.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id
AND w.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId})
AND w.user_code = #{userCode}
AND w.work_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD')
AND w.work_date <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD')
AND tt.type_name IN
#{type}

SELECT DISTINCT action_date FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(th.action_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS action_date FROM task_history th INNER JOIN task t ON th.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN users u ON th.changed_by = u.user_code LEFT JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT JOIN task_history_detail d_type ON th.history_id = d_type.history_id AND d_type.field_name = 'type_name'
AND t.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId})
AND u.user_code = #{userCode}
AND th.action_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD')
AND th.action_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY
AND NVL(d_type.new_value, tt.type_name) IN
#{type}
UNION ALL
SELECT TO_CHAR(w.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS action_date FROM wiki_pages w JOIN users u2 ON w.user_code = u2.user_code
AND w.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId}) AND u2.user_code = #{userCode} AND w.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AND w.created_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY
UNION ALL
SELECT TO_CHAR(h.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS action_date FROM wiki_histories h JOIN wiki_pages wp ON h.wiki_page_id = wp.wiki_page_id JOIN users u3 ON h.user_code = u3.user_code
AND wp.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId}) AND u3.user_code = #{userCode} AND h.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AND h.created_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY
) ORDER BY action_date DESC
